query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, modelRunAt, awayGoalie, homeGoalie, modelAwayPLCoverPct, modelHomePLCoverPct FROM games WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-16' ORDER BY id;
